original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burlywood%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH lineitem_sums AS (
    SELECT 
        l_partkey, 
        l_suppkey, 
        0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum_quantity
    FROM 
        lineitem
    WHERE 
        l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
        AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        l_partkey, l_suppkey
)
SELECT 
    s.s_name, 
    s.s_address
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    n.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        LEFT JOIN lineitem_sums ls ON ps.ps_partkey = ls.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = ls.l_suppkey
        WHERE 
            ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
            AND p.p_name LIKE 'burlywood%'
            AND ps.ps_availqty > COALESCE(ls.half_sum_quantity, 0)
    )
ORDER BY 
    s.s_name;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Changed implicit join to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization potential
Replaced IN clause with EXISTS which can be more efficient as it stops searching once a match is found
Joined part table directly with partsupp to allow early filtering on p_name
